# Henrique Bonfim - Personal Website

## Project Overview
This is the personal portfolio and resume website of Henrique Bonfim, a Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience in full-stack development, microservices, and AI/LLM integrations.
The website serves as a digital business card, showcasing projects, skills, and professional history.

## Architecture & Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 19 (Vite 6)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4, DaisyUI 5, Shadcn/UI (Radix Primitives)
- **Runtime**: Bun
- **I18n**: LinguiJS (English, Portuguese, Spanish)
- **Features**: PWA (Progressive Web App), SEO Optimized (JSON-LD, Sitemap), Dark/Light Mode

## Content Structure
- **/**: Home page - Introduction and summary.
- **/projects**: Portfolio of developed projects.
- **/resume**: Professional experience and skills.
- **/blog**: Technical articles (Planned).

## Key Capabilities
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach.
- **Performance**: Optimized images (WebP), Gzip/Brotli compression.
- **Accessibility**: Semantic HTML, ARIA labels.
